calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, #5162.

Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant J.B. Ingram.
Default entered against defendant on March 17, 2008.
Order granting application for waiver of witness appearance at default prove-up hearing issued April 2, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority, and against the Defaulted Defendant: J.B. INGRAM as follows:

Defendant J.B. INGRAM is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards of any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526. Defendant J.B. INGRAM is enjoined and restrained from entering into, or onto any San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2008 Off Calendar
